advanced_note: Note: copying duplicates files. Existing internal folder translation runs from Advanced Mode so it stays separate from the normal workflow.
help_tooltip: Opens the manual for the active dashboard language.
process_disappeared: The process disappeared or is no longer responding.
advanced_run_active_msg: An advanced action is running. Wait for it to finish before starting another operation.
normal_run_active_msg: A normal dashboard run is active. Wait for it to finish before starting an advanced action.
missing_engine: PhotoOrganizer.ps1 was not found in the same folder as the dashboard.
invalid_source: The source folder does not exist or is not valid.
invalid_destination: The destination folder is not valid.
invalid_destination_parent: The destination parent folder does not exist.
repair_requires_apply: EXIF repair is only allowed together with real changes or simulation.
repair_requires_apply_msg: EXIF repair is only allowed together with real changes or simulation.
confirm_apply: You are about to automatically apply real changes to the entire selected folder. There will be no per-file confirmations. Continue?
confirm_apply_msg: You are about to automatically apply real changes to the entire selected folder. There will be no per-file confirmations. Continue?
confirm_repair_exif: EXIF repair may write metadata to files. The engine creates a local copy before modifying. Continue?
confirm_repair_exif_msg: EXIF repair may write metadata to files. The engine creates a local copy before modifying. Continue?
confirm_exit_running: A run is active. Do you still want to close the dashboard?
folder_not_found: The folder does not exist yet.
engine_ps51: Windows PowerShell 5.1 (works, but PowerShell 7 is recommended for large libraries)
first_run: Large first pass: real apply with EXIF repair is recommended for more accurate dates and folders.
first_run_tip: For a first real pass over a large or unprocessed library, real apply with EXIF repair is recommended because corrected EXIF dates allow more accurate organization.
download_ps7_tip: PowerShell 7 is recommended for better performance and compatibility on large libraries.
hint_dryrun: Simulation: analyzes and shows what it would do. It does not move, copy, or modify files.
hint_dryrun_exif: Simulation with EXIF repair: analyzes possible repairs, but does not modify metadata because simulation is active.
hint_apply: Real apply: organizes the library and moves or copies files according to the configuration. It does not repair EXIF.
hint_apply_exif: Real apply with EXIF repair: organizes the library and may repair EXIF metadata. Recommended for a large first pass.
hint_copy: Copy mode active: keeps originals and creates copies at destination; disk usage may increase.
action_hint_test_scan: Safe test: scans compatible files and validates exclusions and access. It does not read EXIF, calculate hashes, move, copy, or modify files.
action_hint_reconcile: Checks manual or accidental changes and syncs the internal index. It does not move photos, modify EXIF, or reorganize folders.
action_hint_purge_missing: Removes from the internal index only entries already marked as missing. It does not delete photos or move files.
reconcile_description: checks manual or accidental changes and syncs ProcessedFiles.json with the real gallery state. It does not move photos, modify EXIF, or reorganize folders.
advanced_modes_note: Technical engine modes that are not part of the normal flow. They respect Simulation by default; if real Apply is enabled, the dashboard asks for confirmation before starting.
tip_advanced_modes: Shows advanced engine tools without duplicating the main workflow.
technical_console_queued: Advanced action sent to the technical console: {0}.
advanced_retention_cleanup_desc: Cleans only old EXIF backups and old confirmed duplicates. It does not clean the normal gallery, empty folders, or duplicates pending review.
action_hint_advanced_retention_cleanup: Retention cleanup: checks EXIF backups and confirmed duplicate quarantine. In Simulation it only reports; in Apply it may delete safe old content according to retention policy. If the retention age has not been reached yet, deleting nothing is normal.
advanced_recover_wrong_duplicate_move_de: Attempts to recover files wrongly sent to duplicates using logs, the index, and conservative route reconstruction.
action_hint_advanced_recover_wrong_dupli: Recovery: analyzes files wrongly sent to duplicates and proposes/restores safe paths. In Simulation it moves nothing.
advanced_rename_existing_folders_desc: Translates existing quarterly folders to the active language. It does not read photos, calculate hashes, or hydrate cloud content.
action_hint_advanced_rename_existing_fol: Translate existing folders: renames known quarterly folders to the active language. Afterward, Explorer/cloud sync may need a few minutes to refresh.
advanced_rename_internal_folders_desc: Renames or consolidates known internal containers to the active language. It only touches container folders; it does not read photos or hydrate cloud content.
action_hint_advanced_rename_internal_fol: Internal folder translation: detects historical ES/RO/EN aliases and consolidates them to the active language. It does not read content. Explorer/cloud sync may need a few minutes to reindex.
advanced_normalize_existing_folders_desc: Visually restructures to Year\Quarter and cleans empty, junk-only, and residual branches. Explorer/cloud sync may reindex for a while afterward.
action_hint_advanced_normalize_existing_: Normalize: structural cleanup. Visually reorganizes to Year\Quarter and cleans empty/junk branches. In Simulation it generates a plan and report; in Apply wait for Explorer/cloud sync to settle afterward.
advanced_dedupe_cleanup_desc: Finds exact hash duplicates and moves confirmed copies to quarantine in Apply. It does not clean empty folders.
action_hint_advanced_dedupe_cleanup: DedupeCleanup: works with exact SHA256 duplicates. In Simulation it reports; in Apply it moves confirmed copies to quarantine.
advanced_repair_only_library_desc: Repairs EXIF inside the organized library without moving, deduplicating, or renaming files.
action_hint_advanced_repair_only_library: RepairOnly: in-place EXIF repair inside the organized library. It does not move, deduplicate, or rename.
advanced_import_google_takeout_desc: Imports a Google Takeout export, separates logical assets from duplicated album copies, and delivers clean copies to the Year\Quarter destination.
action_hint_advanced_import_google_takeo: ImportProvider Google Takeout: select a Takeout folder, analyze sidecars, albums, trash, video and physical duplicates. Run Simulation first; Apply copies clean assets to the destination.
import_gallery_intro: Use this entry for provider exports that carry more context than loose media files: albums, sidecars, JSON, trash or relationships between items. For normal photo/video folders, use Home.
import_provider_google_desc: Imports a Google Takeout export. Uses JSON sidecars, albums, trash, metadata confidence and logical asset deduplication.
action_hint_import_provider_google: Google Photos / Takeout: select an export, review it in Simulation first, then import clean assets to the Year\Quarter destination using the shared index.
import_provider_apple_desc: Planned for Live Photos, image/video pairs, HEIC/MOV, variants and XMP/IPTC sidecars once real samples are available.
import_provider_samsung_desc: Planned and blocked until a real export proves albums, stories, trash or other recoverable semantics.
import_provider_immich_desc: Planned for libraries with XMP sidecars, albums, tags, ratings and descriptions once suitable samples/exports exist.
import_provider_xmp_desc: Imports an unknown gallery with XMP, JSON or YAML sidecars. Uses clear metadata when possible and falls back to the classic flow when it cannot interpret it.
action_hint_import_provider_xmp: XMP / Sidecar Library: tries to associate media with standard or documented sidecars. Ambiguous relations go to review; if no useful metadata exists, it uses classic fallback.
action_hint_import_gallery_coming: Planned provider: visible in the roadmap, but disabled until real samples or enough design evidence exist.
select_google_takeout: Select the Google Takeout or exported Google Photos folder.
select_xmp_sidecar_library: Select the gallery/export folder containing media and XMP, JSON or YAML sidecars.
confirm_google_takeout_apply_msg: You are about to import from Google Takeout with real changes. Run Simulation first and review the report. Continue with Apply?
advanced_migrate_udmrs_desc: Creates ZIP files for the shared installation and current user state, plus a migration guide. It does not include logs or runtime files.
action_hint_advanced_migrate_udmrs: Migration: creates ZIP files for moving UDMRS to another PC. Includes shared installation and user state; excludes logs, runtime and temporary files.
migration_tool_missing_msg: The internal migration tool was not found.
migration_failed_msg: Could not create the migration package: {0}
excluded_folders_info: Excluded folders will not be organized, repaired, deduplicated, normalized, or purged. Use them for folders managed by other apps or for content you do not want the application to touch.
add_excluded_folder_prompt: Select a folder the application must not touch.
label: Label
folder_protection_summary: Active protected folders: {0}. Found: {1}. Not found: {2}.
folder_protection_hint: These folders are protected areas: they are not organized, repaired, deduplicated, normalized, purged, or hydrated. Use them for folders managed by other apps or content you do not want touched.
tip_copy: Creates copies at destination and keeps the source. Disk and OneDrive usage may double.
tip_keep_empty: Does not remove source folders that become empty after moving files.
tip_diagnostic: Adds more detail to the log for troubleshooting.
tip_open_needs: Opens the folder for files requiring manual review.
tip_open_duplicates: Opens the folder for duplicates requiring manual review.
tip_open_log: Opens the folder where logs are saved.
tip_rename_internal: Translates only project internal folders according to the active language. It does not normalize date or event folders.
tip_test_scan: Test scan: scans compatible files and validates access and exclusions. It does not read EXIF, calculate hashes, create destination folders, move, copy, or modify files.
tip_reconcile_index: Detects old paths in ProcessedFiles.json, searches for the same hash in current locations, and in Apply updates paths or marks entries as missing. It does not move photos, touch EXIF, or reorganize.
tip_purge_missing: Purges only index entries already marked as missing. It does not delete photos or change folders.
tip_logs: Opens the folder where logs and progress.json are saved.
